sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state of the "7" shape and the yellow L-shape to see if they're now aligned vertically.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions of the "7" and yellow L-shape
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'B', 'Y'] and n['pixels'] > 10:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
